title: Create stubbed wolftpm-src/wolftpm-sys/wolftpm crates
description: Create three new workspace crates following the wolfhsm-src/wolfhsm-sys/wolfhsm pattern: wolftpm-src (compiles wolfTPM C library from source via cc crate), wolftpm-sys (bindgen FFI bindings), and wolftpm (safe Rust wrapper stub). Add submodule entry, workspace members, and .cargo/config.toml WOLFTPM_SRC entry.
